summary: Module 12 (Hypocrisy Engine) V2: Critical update to address the 'Passive Detection' audit finding. Implements 'The Gotcha Notification' mechanism. When the Hypocrisy Engine detects a contradiction (e.g., USA acting against past statements), it now auto-generates a sub-thread tagging rival nations (e.g., China/Russia) to maximize viral drama ("The Crown Jewel").
